Note.title: Note
Note.description: A study guide, syllabus, question, or note shared by a user.

description.description: A summary or description of what the note is about.

category.description: The target section/category of the civil engineering materials.

subcategory.description: The specific field, subject, or semester.

content.description: Main textual content, explanation, or markdown of the note.

imageUrls.description: Embedded images for civil engineering charts, diagrams, or handwritten notes pages.

pdfUrl.description: Optional direct PDF URL which should be displayed in a read-only viewer.

userId.description: The Firebase User ID of the uploader.

likes.description: A mapping of userIds to block doubles likes.

isApproved.description: Approval status of the contributed notes material.

tags.description: List of tags associated with the note.

Comment.title: Comment
Comment.description: A discussion comment or query on a specific note.

userId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the commenter.

notes.description: Shared learning resources and study sheets.

notes/{noteId}/comments.description: Sub-collection of comments discussing a shared note document.
